name: alert-dialog-demo
visual_summary: AlertDialogDemo is a customizable alert dialog with a title and message. It can be used to provide feedback to the user after performing an action or to notify them of a specific event. Developers would typically use this component when they need to display important information or ask for user confirmation.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready modal component with the following characteristics:

Name: alert-dialog-demo
Description: AlertDialogDemo is a customizable alert dialog with a title and message. It can be used to provide feedback to the user after performing an action or to notify them of a specific event. Developers would typically use this component when they need to display important information or ask for user confirmation.
Style: material, dark
Interactions: dismissable
Tags: alert, dialog, feedback, notification

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
